items.caption: An aerial view of a residential area with multiple swimming pools. there are at least four pools visible, each with different shapes and sizes, surrounded by various structures such as houses, fences, and trees. the pools are likely private backyard pools, and the image suggests a discussion about the potential value of adding a pool to a home. the style of the image is a standard aerial photograph with a focus on the layout and design of the pools and their immediate surroundings.
